message:
refactor(vdbe): replace top_mut/unwind_to_trigger with safer APIs

FrameStack API changes (frame.rs):
- Replace top_mut() with update_top(): applies mutations through a
  clone-then-swap pattern that validates the memory budget invariant
  before accepting changes. Returns Err(OutOfMemory) if the mutation
  would exceed the configured budget, preventing silent overcommit.
- Replace unwind_to_trigger(name) with unwind_to_index(target_index):
  uses explicit 0-based frame index instead of trigger name matching.
  Returns Err if the target index is out of bounds rather than silently
  unwinding the full stack. This prevents accidental full-stack unwinds
  when a trigger name doesn't match any frame.

Test fix (conformance_oracle_s55.rs):
- Add deterministic tiebreaker (cat ASC) to GROUP BY ORDER BY
  COUNT(*) DESC query to prevent nondeterministic oracle comparison
  failures when groups have equal counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
